hooks.template: They said, "(insert famous cliché or quote)" — that's a lie.
hooks.text: They said the rate on Google is the rate you get. That's a lie.

hooks.template: Everyone tells you to (insert action) but nobody actually tells you how to do it.
hooks.text: Everyone tells you to check the rate. Nobody tells you it's not the real one.

hooks.template: Yesterday I was at (insert location) when I noticed something (insert adjective).
hooks.text: A business owner paid his supplier and noticed the rate looked worse than Google's.

hooks.template: My customer/client got (insert dream result) without (insert pain point).
hooks.text: One business owner saved 300 dollars on one wire without changing anything but the rate tier.

hooks.template: I do not believe in (insert common belief), I believe in (insert your belief).
hooks.text: Don't believe the rate on your bank app. Believe the rate banks use with each other.
